concepts.headline: Fueling the Mission's creative spark.
concepts.subline: Artisanal single-origin espresso and late-night pour-overs.
concepts.rationale: High-contrast imagery and bold copy capture local creatives walking by on Valencia Street.

concepts.headline: Café local para mentes creativas.
concepts.subline: Tu punto de encuentro en el corazón del barrio.
concepts.rationale: Appeals directly to the neighborhood's Spanish-speaking community with a warm, welcoming local invitation.
